series_metadata.series_description: Information about quality standards for elements, site certification of lab technicians, certification tests, instrumentation tests, efficiency curves, which relate to tests at the ODH Lab. Also includes other tested variables used at the ODH lab.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office for one year, then transfer to the State Records Ctr. Retain in the State Records Center for two years, then destroy pro- vided that information is not included as part of a court case and has been released by all related audits., Paper: Wastepaper
